Unfortunately, we’re unable to offer free samples. As a retailer, we buy all magazines from their publishers at the regular trade price. However, you could contact the magazine’s publisher directly to ask if they can send you a free copy.

","question":"Can I order a free copy of a magazine to sample?","button":{"text":"Click Here"}}],"accordion":false,"first_tab_open":false,"first_tab_opened":false,"items":[{"answer":"

Yes, we can produce the products according to your customized requirements.

","question":"Could you do OEM/ODM order?"},{"answer":"

Always a pre-production sample before mass production; Always final inspection before shipment.

","question":"How can we guarantee quality?"},{"answer":"

Usually is one year. We will offer the free accessories or full machine if the quality problems.

","question":"What is the warranty time."},{"answer":"

Quantity lower MOQ can be discussed. The price depends on your needs. The more the quantity, the cheaper the price.

","question":"How about MOQ? How about the price?"},{"question":"What best price you can offer?","answer":"

As the leading supplier in the market, we can provide you with best price and excellent quality. Please feel free to contact us to get best price.

"},{"question":"Do you accept drop-shipping?","answer":"

Yes, dropshipping business is the important part of our business.

"},{"question":"Do you help to search other pet products?","answer":"

We can do it if you want. As we have a strong supply chain.

"},{"question":"How to ship the goods?","answer":"

We can ship it by air, by train and by sea, depends on your request.

"},{"question":"Do you support DDP services?","answer":"

Yes, after you send the address, we can offer a DDP price for reference.

"},{"question":"If we want to design a new product, can you do this services?","answer":"

Yes, we can do this. We can create a group in wechat/whatsapp, you can talk your idea with our engineers directly.
